name: Rauf Muritala
headline: Building scalable data platforms and analytics systems.
tagline: I design production-grade pipelines, warehouses, and analytics layers on Azure, AWS, and GCP — turning raw, fragmented data into reliable foundations for decision-making.
about: I'm a Data Engineer focused on building data platforms that hold up in production — not just pipelines that run, but systems with clear contracts, tested models, observable failures, and costs you can explain.

My work spans the full lifecycle: ingesting raw transactional and event data, structuring it through layered architectures like Medallion (Bronze → Silver → Gold), modeling it for analytics with dbt, and delivering it to the business through warehouses and BI tools. I care as much about data quality, documentation, and maintainability as I do about throughput.

I currently work at Bujeti (YC W23), a corporate-cards and spend-management fintech, where I design and build the data platform and analytics layers that power product, finance, and operations decisions.
